name: Youtube
description: Requires python3, and AISA_API_KEY. Uses the supplied AISA_API_KEY to send requests to https://api.aisa.one. Native-first ClawHub plugin for `youtube`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. YouTube SERP Scout for agents. Search top-ranking videos, channels, and trends for content research and competitor tracking. Use when: the user needs YouTube search, trend discovery, channel research, or SERP analysis.

commands.name: youtube
commands.description: YouTube SERP Scout for agents. Search top-ranking videos, channels, and trends for content research and competitor tracking. Use when: the user needs YouTube search, trend discovery, channel research, or SERP analysis.

AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.

providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Used only to authorize requests to the AIsa API service.
